This notification shall come into force from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 7/4/2014-CL.I(B)] AMARDEEP SINGH BHATIA, Jt. Secy. 2451 GI/2014 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
